channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats reject White House ICE offer as partial shutdown looms – US politics live
item.description: Schumer and Jeffries says White House proposal is ‘incomplete and insufficient’ as prospect of deal recedes Americans’ hope for their future has falle...

item.title: Barclays CEO ‘shocked’ by Epstein revelations as bank deals with Staley fallout
item.description: CS Venkatakrishnan dismayed by ‘depravity and corruption’ revealed in Epstein files as he announces profits Business live – latest updates The chief e...

item.title: Macron says Europe facing ‘profound geopolitical rupture’ amid changes in world order – Europe live
item.description: “It is time for Europe to wake up … If we do not decide for ourselves, we will be swept away,” the French president said Meanwhile, Romanian foreign m...

item.title: Welsh first minister Eluned Morgan backs Starmer but cites ‘concerns’ after Scottish Labour leader calls for his resignation – UK politics live
item.description: The prime minister Keir Starmer is hoping to push forward on policy following a bruising week for his leadership Kemi Badenoch has said that Keir Star...

item.title: Teen boy who admitted to killing 12-year-old Leo Ross to be sentenced – live updates
item.description: The 12-year-old was stabbed by a stranger as he walked home from school in January 2025 Justice Choudhury KC is back from his deliberation and will ma...

item.title: The messy Quad God and kitchen blender set to be an Olympic superstar
item.description: Ilia Malinin is not like most figure skaters. Even when he makes mistakes, he is still so far ahead of the rest that he wins Olympic gold.

item.title: 'Skilled butcher' murdered, cut up and buried partner
item.description: Anna Podedworna is convicted of the murder of Izabela Zablocka, whose remains were found last year.

item.title: William meets female footballers during Saudi Arabia visit
item.description: The Prince of Wales hears about female participation in sport in the Gulf state on the second day of his visit.

item.title: Why British coach is 'game-changer' for Super Bowl winners & NFL
item.description: With Aden Durde having become the first overseas coach to win the Super Bowl, what does it mean for the NFL and the international game?

item.title: US lawmakers accuse justice department of 'inappropriately' redacting Epstein files
item.description: Republican Thomas Massie and Democrat Ro Khanna say the DOJ is not complying with their transparency law.
